title: Book Build Workflow
description: Interactive workflow diagram showing the complete process for building an intelligent textbook, from course description through final book metrics
subject: Educational Technology
creator: Claude AI with Mermaid Generator Skill
style_notes: Light pastel rainbow color scheme progressing through spectrum (light red, orange, yellow, green, cyan, blue, purple, pink, peach, mint, coral, violet), minimal padding and margins for iframe embedding
educational_context: Textbook development workflow, project management, educational design process
learningObjectives: Sequence the four phases of intelligent textbook production: course description, learning graph, chapter structure, then chapter development
Explain why the learning graph must precede chapter structure, since concept dependencies determine chapter ordering
Distinguish the sequential foundation steps from the parallel chapter development that can proceed concurrently once the structure exists
Identify the Content Complete milestone as the quality gate that must be reached before glossary, FAQ, quizzes, and references are generated
Trace the two parallel completion tracks, educational resources and quality assurance, from Content Complete through to book metrics
